text:
This is a cryptographically signed message in MIME format.
 
 --------------ms050605050509080600000101
 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8; format=flowed
 Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable
 
 On 04/19/2012 05:50 PM, Dmitry Banschikov wrote:
 >> Submitter-Id:	current-users
 >> Originator:	Dmitry Banschikov
 >> Organization:	hostcomm
 >> Confidential:	no
 >> Synopsis:	[patch] mail/slapd-cyrus update dependency on cyrus-imapd ve=
 rsion
 >> Severity:	non-critical
 >> Priority:	low
 >> Category:	ports
 >> Class:		update
 >> Release:	FreeBSD 8.2-RELEASE-p6 amd64
 >> Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD amnesia 8.2-RELEASE-p6 FreeBSD 8.2-RELEASE-p6 #0: Fri J=
 an 6 04:21:04 UTC 2012 root@amnesia:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC amd64
 >
 >
 >> Description:
 > Update dependency of cyrus-imapd version up to 2.4 branch (cyrus-imapd2=
 4 port).
 > Set up PORTREVISION variable.
 >> How-To-Repeat:
 > =09
 >> Fix:
 >
 > =09
 >
 > --- ports.mail.slapd-cyrus.patch begins here ---
 > diff -ruN slapd-cyrus.orig/Makefile slapd-cyrus/Makefile
 > --- slapd-cyrus.orig/Makefile	2012-01-21 17:40:10.000000000 +0000
 > +++ slapd-cyrus/Makefile	2012-04-19 13:30:16.000000000 +0000
 > @@ -7,6 +7,7 @@
 >
 >   PORTNAME=3D	slapd-cyrus
 >   PORTVERSION=3D	1.00
 > +PORTREVISION=3D	1
 >   CATEGORIES=3D	mail net
 >   MASTER_SITES=3D	SF/${PORTNAME}
 >   DISTNAME=3D	Slapd-Backend-Cyrus-${PORTVERSION}
 > @@ -14,7 +15,7 @@
 >   MAINTAINER=3D	alexey@renatasystems.org
 >   COMMENT=3D	Slapd backend to translate DIT into Cyrus configuration
 >
 > -BUILD_DEPENDS=3D	cyrus-imapd>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/cyrus-imapd23 \
 > +BUILD_DEPENDS=3D	cyrus-imapd>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/mail/cyrus-imapd24 \
 >   		p5-BerkeleyDB>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-BerkeleyDB \
 >   		p5-Class-Accessor-Lvalue>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor-L=
 value \
 >   		p5-IO-String>=3D0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IO-String \
 > --- ports.mail.slapd-cyrus.patch ends here ---
 >
 >
 
 
 =D0=9B=D0=B5=D1=88=D1=8C, =D0=BF=D0=BE=D0=B4=D1=82=D0=B2=D0=B5=D1=80=D0=B4=
 =D0=B8=D1=88=D1=8C?
 
 
 
 --=20
 
 Dmitry Banschikov
